original_image_tags: A page of typewritten text with a header row and 16 numbered entries. There are two hole-punch marks at the top of the page. A blue box in the top-left corner contains the text: "This image contains all the information on the document."

elements.description: Typewritten table listing 16 report numbers with 'Manner of Disappearance' and 'Remarks' columns. A blue overlay box in the top left corner reads 'This image contains all the information on the document.'

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the visual elements: a typewritten table with 16 entries, a blue box in the top-left corner, and the identical quoted text within that box.
